Video.summary: Greg will reveal to his girlfriend, Deidra, that he secretly works as a gay, male escort. Next Madrina's boyfriend keeps cheating on her with his ex­. Then Ro-Ro has two girlfriends and today they'll force her to choose between them.
Video.title: Secret Sex Lives

Video.summary: Ashley's mother is here because she says she's witnessed first hand Ashley's boyfriend Scott's abusive ways. She says that Scott has completely isolated Ashley and her grandchild from the rest of her family.
Video.title: You Want Him To Be The Father?

Image.alt: You Want Him To Be The Father?
You Want Him To Be The Father?
You Want Him To Be The Father?

Video.summary: Dorothy is 17 years old and has felt so uncomfortable living at home with her mom and stepdad, that she has resorted to selling her body to take care of herself. Then, Connie says her ex pressured her to get pregnant at 16 and then refused to help her support their child.
Video.title: Teen Girls In Trouble

Video.summary: Andrew believes Margarita cheated on him throughout their 13-year relationship; Sarah believes Wendell may be cheating on her.
Video.title: One Recording Destroyed Our Family

Video.summary: Josephine's family was ripped apart after her boyfriend Mark was accused of molestation. Her son, Anthony and his girlfriend, Renee believe Mark molested their 2 year old son. But Mark believes that Renee coached her son to say this!
Video.title: I Believe My Son!

Video.summary: Theresa and Darron were arrested for child endangerment after their toddler daughter was spotted begging for food and now face sexual abuse accusations. Then, Megan believes her fiancé Mark physically abused her baby, and possibly broke his leg!
Video.title: We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents

Image.alt: We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents
We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents
We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents

Video.summary: Steve looks back at some of the more intense relationships highlighted on the show in its first 10 years.
Video.title: Shocking Relationships

Video.summary: Katie says her boyfriend, Brandon, is addicted to porn and has caught him sending dirty letters to other women including her mother! Then, 6 months into dating Crosby, Dayana cheated on him and now, he wants to know if their child is his!
Video.title: You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?

Image.alt: You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?
You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?
You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?

Video.summary: They say the "terrible teens" can be a trying time for parents. But 13 year old Kendra is really giving her parents a run for their money. Her father says that she's been caught smoking weed, having sex and even cutting herself.
Video.title: Drugs and Sex At 13?

Video.summary: A woman cheats with a little person she met at a chicken fight; a waffle waitress has an illicit affair with one of her customers.
Video.title: One Night Stands

Video.summary: Kitten wants to tell her mother that she is a prostitute because her mother was neglectful and drove her to it. These two women face off over the lies. Next ... Even though Skat's ex-girlfriend is married, he believes he can win her back!
Video.title: Heartbreaking Secrets

Video.summary: Antiatte's friend and sister determine whether she will accept her boyfriend's marriage proposal; two women battle it out for a porn star's love; Britanny says something is fishy about her boyfriend's behavior.
Video.title: Proposal Do-Over

Video.summary: Alex thinks he's here to reveal his secret lover, Naomi, to his girlfriend. But, Naomi has an even the bigger secret! Next Taneisha knows she has to now tell Roger the truth about herself...she's a transsexual prostitute!
Video.title: Clash Of The Transexuals!

Video.summary: Freddie insists he wants to be with his wife and his days of hooking up with his ex-girlfriend are over; Carleeta devises a scheme she thinks will strengthen her bond with her sister; Shi's friend and boyfriend got to know each other better.
Video.title: Busted by Your Bestie

Video.summary: Susan is disgusted by her son Ron's incestual behavior with her niece, Tracy. But Ron insists that he is in love with Tracy and he will not let anyone get in the way of him marrying her.
Video.title: Kissin' Cousins

Video.summary: They say that money makes the world go round. These guests say that they make money by laying on their backs!
Video.title: Prostitutes Tell All

Video.summary: Jon wants to start fresh and come clean to his fiancee about his secret affair. But first, his secret lover, Kirn, has some news for him! Then Racquel doesn't know why she's here, but when the babysitter arrives, she figures it out in a hurry!
Video.title: I Want Your Lover!

Video.summary: Deshawn is engaged to his baby's mother, but it did not stop him from hooking up with his friend; Quan must reveal a secret to his fiancee; Makayla has a confession that could end her engagement.
Video.title: Grooms Full of Bologna

Video.summary: Brittany's got a bone to pick with Brandi, a stripper that keeps getting in the way of her happiness. Then Jeremy finally found a girl just like dear old mom, but too bad mom is a stripper, and hence girlfriend Jessica is too.
Video.title: Stripper Tales

Video.summary: These parents do not see eye to eye when it comes to their cross-dressing children.
Video.title: I'm Not Who You Think I Am

Image.alt: I'm Not Who You Think I Am
I'm Not Who You Think I Am
I'm Not Who You Think I Am

Video.summary: These newlyweds are matched with conflicting issues that could end their marriages, unless Sally can help mend the relationships between these couples.
Video.title: Newlywed Drama

Video.summary: Mother's stand up to their violent and abusive children once and for all.
Video.title: Teen Girls Gone Bad

Video.summary: Teen girls confront their boyfriends about their abusive behavior in an attempt to end it.
Video.title: Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?

Image.alt: Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?
Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?
Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?

Video.summary: Girlfriends confront their boyfriends who dumped them because they refused to get abortions and refuse to be involved in the baby’s life.
Video.title: Pregnant Ultimatums

Video.summary: These moms seek help from Sally for their troubling teenagers.
Video.title: My Teen is Going to End Up a Criminal

Image.alt: My Teen is Going to End Up a Criminal
My Teen is Going to End Up a Criminal
My Teen is Going to End Up a Criminal

Video.summary: Babies having babies. These mother's show concern for their underage pregnant daughters.
Video.title: I'm Only 12 . . . And Im Pregnant

Video.summary: Children meet their fathers for the first time In this emotional episode.
Video.title: More Paternity Updates

Video.summary: Why do these new moms feel it necessary to protect their babies from grandma?
Video.title: Mom, Stay Away from My Kids

Image.alt: Mom, Stay Away from My Kids
Mom, Stay Away from My Kids
Mom, Stay Away from My Kids

Video.summary: Parents, Siblings, and Children meet their families for the first time.
Video.title: I Never Knew I Had a Family

Image.alt: I Never Knew I Had a Family
I Never Knew I Had a Family
I Never Knew I Had a Family

Video.summary: These young girls think that having a baby will improve their lives. Sally is here to convince them otherwise.
Video.title: My Teen's Desperate to Get Pregnant

Image.alt: My Teen's Desperate to Get Pregnant
My Teen's Desperate to Get Pregnant
My Teen's Desperate to Get Pregnant

Video.summary: These women's lives are dictated by their controlling lovers. Today they take a stand.
Video.title: You'll Wear What I Say!

Video.summary: Linda, once teased for being fat and geeky, transforms into a bombshell ready to confront her past.
Video.title: I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!

Image.alt: I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!
I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!
I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!
